mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message ( interview_id, user_id, question_id, user_answer, ai_feedback, score, create_time ) VALUES ( #{interviewId}, #{userId}, #{questionId}, #{userAnswer}, #{aiFeedback}, #{score}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, interview_id AS interviewId, user_id AS userId, question_id AS questionId, user_answer AS userAnswer, ai_feedback AS aiFeedback, score, create_time AS createTime FROM chat_message ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, interview_id AS interviewId, user_id AS userId, question_id AS questionId, user_answer AS userAnswer, ai_feedback AS aiFeedback, score, create_time AS createTime FROM chat_message WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, interview_id AS interviewId, user_id AS userId, question_id AS questionId, user_answer AS userAnswer, ai_feedback AS aiFeedback, score, create_time AS createTime FROM chat_message WHERE interview_id = #{interviewId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
